payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article contents because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. I can only note that you attempted to save this URL for the reason: useful for memory architecture, but I will not create a durable article memory without accessible source content.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable claims about its contents can be verified.

details: No memory card was created because article contents were unavailable.
No source claims were inferred or invented.

repair_options: Ask to save only the URL and your stated reason, without claims about article contents.
